text: The atmosphere here is charged with curiosity and potential. Through the glass, I observe a small gathering engaged in thoughtful exchange; their focus draws me in, yet I remain a subtle observer outside. Stepping into the next space, the vivid R+D wall and its thoughtful passages invite me to ponder progress and the human impulse to innovate. I feel both inspired and slightly detached, as though on the threshold of joining something creative and transformative. There is a hum of intellect, an undercurrent of collective purpose, and I am filled with quiet anticipation, wondering how I might contribute—or simply witness—the unfolding of new ideas.
